description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge extension on the right side. The sofa features a clean, boxy silhouette with straight armrests and a low, continuous backrest. It is upholstered in a solid, light gray fabric that appears smooth and tightly fitted, giving it a contemporary look. The seat and back cushions are loose, generously filled, and uniform in size, with four matching throw pillows adding extra comfort and visual interest. The sofa stands on short, square legs that are slightly recessed, likely made of wood or metal with a matte finish. Its overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with loose cushions and a chaise lounge extension, supported by short, square legs. The design is minimalist and comfortable, ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, seat and back cushions, and four throw pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise lounge extension and the straight armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the armrest and the arrangement of cushions along the back.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four loose, uniform back cushions and two seat cushions, with four matching throw pillows; cushions are rectangular and evenly spaced, typical of a sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at both ends, matching the sofa's height and covered in the same fabric, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, square legs positioned at the corners and under the chaise, slightly recessed, likely made of wood or metal with a matte finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with loose, uniform cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
